$schema: NPC dialogue table for the walk scene (Task 19). Slots: greeter, guide-wait, guide-arrive ({landmark} token). landmarks steer the guide NPC.
greeter: Welcome to the strip — neon never sleeps here.
Hey. Watch the puddles, the lights look better in them anyway.
Glad you dropped in. The signs are louder than they look.
Welcome in. Stick to the glow and you won't get lost.
guide-wait: Take your time — I'll wait under the sign.
No rush. The city runs all night.
I'll hold here by the lights until you catch up.
guide-arrive: This is {landmark}. Best view of the towers.
We made it to {landmark}. Soak in the neon.
